notes: Maximizing Agility is key — socket bonuses are rarely worth it before caps. Capacitive Primal Diamond is the legendary meta from Wrathion's questline. Drops listed are 25 Heroic; Normal/Flex versions are the same items at lower item level. Draft compiled from Icy Veins MoP Classic guides.
